title: Overview of Munger University UG Admission 2026-30

detail.title: Overview of Munger University UG Admission 2026-30
detail.short_info: Munger University UG Admission Online Form 2026-30 is open. Apply online for BA, BSc, BCom (4-Year CBCS) from April 29 to May 25, 2026. Check eligibility, fees, important dates, and direct application link here.

content.text: Munger University has started the online application process for admission to 4-Year Undergraduate programmes (BA, BSc, BCom under CBCS) for the academic session 2026-30. Eligible candidates can apply online through the Samarth admission portal from 29 April 2026 to 25 May 2026, with admission based on Class 12 merit marks.

Candidates can check complete details including eligibility criteria, application fee, important dates, required documents, and the step-by-step online application process to complete the admission form successfully.

sections.heading: Overview of Munger University UG Admission 2026-30

rows: UG Admission (BA, BSc, BCom) – 4 Year CBCS

content.text: Apply Online: Munger University UG Admission 2026-30 Portal

rows: Passed 10+2 / Intermediate from a recognized board
Passed 10+2 / Intermediate from a recognized board
Passed 10+2 / Intermediate from a recognized board

content.text: Note: Candidates applying for multiple programmes must pay Rs. 1000/- separately for each programme.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Munger University UG Admission 2026

items: Visit the official admission portal: mungeruniversityadm.samarth.edu.in
Click on “Apply For Admissions” and register with valid details.
Fill the online application form with personal, academic and contact information.
Upload scanned photograph, signature and educational documents.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 1000/- online.
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

sections.heading: Documents Required for Munger University UG Admission

items: Scanned Photograph (less than 500 KB)
Scanned Signature (less than 500 KB)
Class 10th Marksheet
Class 12th Marksheet
Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable)
Domicile Certificate (if required)

sections.heading: Munger University UG Admission 2026: Courses Offered

content.text: BA, BSc, BCom (4-Year Undergraduate Programmes under Choice Based Credit System)
